_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremC_L1_closed_form.py (C3). Mirrors the C3Config dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §7.3 and the script's module docstring. C3 validates the theorem-C closed-form L=1 block-commutant lower bound against L-BFGS numerical optimum and visualizes the obstruction's dependence on within-block heterogeneity κ. Ancestry: run_loss_vs_w.py, run_loss_landscape.py.
